hooks.command: FILE=$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+' | head -1); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.java$'; then cd /Users/baobaoyang/Documents/coding/github_self/card_learn/card-learn-boot && mvn compile -DskipTests -q 2>&1 | tail -5; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.swift$'; then xcodebuild -project /Users/baobaoyang/Documents/coding/github_self/card_learn/card-ios/CardLearn.xcodeproj -scheme CardLearn -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' build 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
